<!-- Project-specific instructions for GitHub Copilot -->

## Next.js App Router Project with Tailwind CSS

This is a Next.js project using the App Router for pages and Tailwind CSS for styling.

### Project Structure
- `/app` - Page router files and layouts
- `/components` - Reusable React components
- `/lib` - Utility functions (includes Supabase client setup)

### Key Technologies
- Next.js with App Router
- Tailwind CSS
- TypeScript
- Supabase integration (lib/supabaseClient.ts)

### Development
Run `npm run dev` to start the development server at http://localhost:3000

### Build & Deploy
Run `npm run build` to build the project for production.
